_doc: Manually-walked trailer prices for entries the static def parser sees as price=0. See AlexOQ/trucker#254. Populate via in-game dealer/configurator walk; merger lives at scripts/merge-manual-prices.ts.

schmitz_scs_single.formula: price = chain_base + chassis + body (5000 for any of 4 universal/ecofix/_p variants) + paintjob_default. The `_p` body suffix indicates more paintable surface, NOT 'paint applied' — paint cost is identical across all body variants and is included in dealer stock pricing.
schmitz_scs_single._note: Decomposition walked 2026-05-09 from in-game customization screen. Ecofix bodies only available on chassis_single_3 per game data. Paintjob range observed at dealer; 17000 is the mid-tier default used in stock offers. All ids on a given chassis price identically when configured with default paint.

schmitz_scs_double.formula: price = 24425 + 32000 + 8000 + paintjob_default(38410) = 102835 (stock-offer level). Cheapest with min-paint 5200 = 69625.
schmitz_scs_double._note: Decomposed 2026-05-09 from cheapest-variant 69625 EUR observation + 102835 stock-offer cross-check. Body fee 8k vs single's 5k (larger body); paintjob default 38410 vs single's 17000 (more paintable surface). Only one chassis variant (double_3_2) ships for S.CS double per game data.

schmitz_scs_hct.formula: price = 34615 + 44000 + 10000 + paintjob_default(69625) = 158240 (stock-offer level). Cheapest with min-paint 7800 = 96415.
schmitz_scs_hct._note: Decomposed 2026-05-09 from cheapest 96415 + 158240 stock cross-check. Body fee 10k vs double's 8k vs single's 5k. Paintjob default 69625 sits at 81% of range — higher than single's 60% or double's 65%; plausibly SCS-default fanciness on premium config. Only one chassis variant (hct_3_2_3) ships.

schmitz_sbo_single.formula: price = 10450 + chassis + 30000 body_express + paintjob_default(23335). Cheapest with min-paint 2600 + smallest chassis 17000 = 60050.
schmitz_sbo_single._note: Decomposed 2026-05-09. S.BO Express has only one body (vs S.CS's 4 cosmetic variants), but body fee 30k is 6× S.CS single's 5k — premium dryvan-class. Chassis prices match S.CS single (17k/20k/25k). Paintjob default 23335 derived from 83785 stock cross-check (assumed 3-axle); 83% of range.

schmitz_ski_single.formula: price ≈ 9310 + chassis + body + 27000 paintjob_default. Cheapest = 9310 + 16000 (2ax) + 15000 (solid) + 2600 (min paint) = 42910.
schmitz_ski_single._note: Decomposed 2026-05-09 from cheapest 42910 + two stock cross-checks (66725 ch_2_dsl.solid, 78725 ch_3_33_dal.light_sc). 6 chassis stems — 3-axle comes in two lengths (8.5m short = ch_3_*; 9.6m long = ch_3_33_*) at identical chassis fee but different trailer volume. Paintjob default observed at 26415-27415 across stock offers (~1k variance, possibly scales with body surface); used 27000 average for entries. _sc body suffix = sliding cover (1-2k premium over non-sc).

schmitz.scs.single_2.curtain.notes: Build-up: 16785 + 17000 chassis_single_2 + 5000 body + 17000 paint. Same price as curtainp (body variant is cosmetic — paintable-surface delta, not pricing delta).

schmitz.scs.single_2.curtainp.notes: Same as curtain at this chassis — `_p` body variant has more paintable surface, no price delta.

schmitz.scs.single_3.curtain.notes: Stock offer (S.CS universal). Build-up: 16785 + 20000 chassis_single_3 + 5000 body + 17000 paint.

schmitz.scs.single_3.curtainp.notes: Same as curtain at this chassis.

schmitz.scs.single_3.curtain_ef.notes: Stock offer (S.CS ecofix). Same chassis price as universal.

schmitz.scs.single_3sp.curtain.notes: Build-up: 16785 + 20000 chassis_single_3sp + 5000 body + 17000 paint. Steerable-spread chassis prices same as single_3.

schmitz.scs.single_3_15.curtain.notes: Build-up: 16785 + 25000 chassis_single_3_15 (3 axles long, 15m) + 5000 body + 17000 paint.

schmitz.scs.double_3_2.curtain.notes: Build-up: 24425 chain_double_base + 32000 chassis_double_3_2 + 8000 body + 38410 paintjob_default. Same price as curtainp.

schmitz.scs.double_3_2.curtainp.notes: Stock offer (S.CS Universal Double). Same as curtain (cosmetic body variant, no price delta).

schmitz.scs.hct_3_2_3.curtain.notes: Build-up: 34615 chain_hct_base + 44000 chassis_hct_3_2_3 + 10000 body + 69625 paintjob_default. Same price as curtainp.

schmitz.scs.hct_3_2_3.curtainp.notes: Stock offer (S.CS Universal HCT). Same as curtain.

schmitz.sbo.single_3.dryvan.notes: Stock offer (S.BO Express). Build-up: 10450 + 20000 chassis_single_3 + 30000 body_express + 23335 paintjob_default.

schmitz.ski.ch_2_dsl.solid.notes: Build-up: 9310 + 16000 ch_2_dsl + 15000 body_solid + 27000 paintjob_default. Stock cross-check: 66725 (paint 26415, ~1k below 27000 average).

schmitz.ski.ch_2_dal.solid.notes: Build-up: 9310 + 16000 ch_2_dal (alu legs, same fee as steel) + 15000 + 27000.

schmitz.ski.ch_3_dal.solid.notes: Build-up: 9310 + 20000 ch_3_dal (3ax short alu) + 15000 + 27000. Overrides parser=35000.

schmitz.ski.ch_3_33_dal.light_sc.notes: Build-up: 9310 + 20000 + 22000 + 27000. Overrides parser=47000. Stock cross-check (s.ki light 33/9.6 ak sliding cover): 78725 (paint 27415, ~415 above 27000 average).

schmitz.sko.single_3.reefer.notes: Stock offer (S.KO cool). Conflicts with parser=80000. S.KO city variant (137,050) has NO matching parser id — see followup issue.

schmitz.sko.double_3_2.reefer.notes: Stock offer (S.KO cool double). Conflicts with parser=132000.

_resolved_stock_offers_decode.ski_solid_24_77_2_sr_66725: Decoded 2026-05-09: S.KI solid 24/77.2 sr = ch_2_dsl.solid (2-axle steel, 8.5m). Build-up math fits.
_resolved_stock_offers_decode.ski_light_33_9_6_ak_sliding_cover_78725: Decoded: S.KI light 33/9.6 ak sliding cover = ch_3_33_dal.light_sc (3-axle long alu, 9.6m, sliding cover). 'ak' likely shorthand for aluminium-K(ommode/legs).

_known_parser_gaps.schmitz_sko_city_vs_cool: Stock offers show distinct prices: city=137050, cool=143685. Parser merges both under single 'reefer' body. Tracked at AlexOQ/trucker#256.
